meaning: n.赞美诗集adj.赞美诗的,使用赞美诗的
examples: He was thrilled, since it was the only hymnal in his church.
The hymnal that mother gave me is containing more than 600 hymns.
After years using, the cover of our church's Hymnal were broken and need to be replaced.
This is the hymnal version heard early in game and thematically it perfectly illustrates the haughty religious story themes.
He sang in the church choir and liked to put little pieces of paper in the hymnal to mark the songs he was supposed to sing.
